newsItems.title: Open House 2026
newsItems.actionStatement: Open House Was A Great Success!
newsItems.content: Department held demonstrations for the community and kids got to learn about the trucks

newsItems.title: Smoke Detectors Save Lives
newsItems.content: Change your smoke detector batteries every year.

newsItems.title: 2026 T-Shirts are in.
newsItems.content: Stop by the post office or the fire house to purchase our 2022 Fire Department T shirts. Thanks for your support.
